title: MoreAvaritia
description: add more fun items for avaritia greed
body:
add more fun items for avaritia greed
added a lot of items, endless equipment revision and endless tool revision, a variety of props, let endless greed become more liver and more powerful.
添加了很多物品，无尽装备的改版和无尽工具的改版，各种各样的道具，让无尽贪婪变得更肝，也更加强大
all kinds of things
pre-mod:Avaritia,CodeChickenLib
Article Description:
Endless Axe Change: Left button 3 times drop
Infinity Blade · Change: right-click a small range of seconds to kill, enhance the left button right attack power
Endless hoe · Change: Left key hit higher damage, and attack to the creature take off
Endless bow · Change: right click without holding power, infinite launch, holding resistance tip 4 effect
Endless pick · Change: left key mining automatic smelting
Endless shovel · Change: Compete for the effect of Health Recovery 5
The above items have modes, but the map did not switch
An array of equipment for Endless ingots
A range of equipment for neutron ingot
Compressed endless ingot and a series of compressed neutrons
Self-explosion final look Pearl: Black hole formed under foot
Endless energy: I don't know how long it will last, but a long time
Charge Crystal: Material for synthesizing and modifying equipment
Toyi: Fighting for circles
Endless singularities: Synthetic materials
That's part of it. There's more
物品介绍:
无尽斧·改:左键3倍掉落
无尽剑·改:右键小范围秒杀，增强左键右键攻击力
无尽锄·改:左键打人伤害更高，并且攻击到的生物起飞
无尽弓·改:右键不用蓄力，无限发射，拿着有抗性提示4的效果
无尽镐·改:左键挖矿自动熔炼
无尽铲·改:争着有生命恢复5的效果
以上物品有模式的都有，只是贴图没切换
无尽之锭的一系列装备
中子锭的一系列装备
压缩无尽锭和一系列压缩中子
自爆终望珍珠:黑洞生成在脚下
无尽能源:不知道能烧多久，反正很久
充能水晶:合成·改装备的材料
陀仪:争着转圈圈
无尽奇点:合成材料
Warning: Let Avaritia load first, otherwise it will crash, you can put a few exclamation marks in front of Avaritia jar
